paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.65, with a change of 8.66% from the prior close and -25.86% over a window of 21 sessions. The price is as of July 21, 2026.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with a headline regarding Fermi Inc.'s second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, scheduled for August 13, 2026, as reported by TradingView. Recent social posts include mentions of the arrival of Siemens turbines at the Port of Houston and a trader's decision to trim their position at 6.80.

Fermi Inc. has 25 total filings in the feed, including one Form 4 filing and 17 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and a response letter from Everson, as well as an 8-K form regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031.
